key.name: hide-edit-menu-item
key.description: Whether to hide the Edit Entry menu item from the context menu

key.name: hide-open-location-menu-item
key.summary: Hide Open Entry Location menu item
key.description: Whether to hide the Open Entry Location menu item from the context menu

key.name: hide-properties-menu-item
key.description: Whether to hide the Properties menu item from the context menu

key.name: hide-delete-menu-item
key.description: Whether to hide the Delete menu item from the context menu
